[cron:df4ed5e4-9a50-4dd7-876e-d66fbff7b017 s2-coordination] Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\POLICY.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\DIRECTIVE.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\ACTIVE.md. For each slot with status in-progress write a lock entry to Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\LOCKS.md with file, worker, time, expiry 20 minutes from now. Remove locks older than 20 minutes. Remove locks for slots marked done or failed. If two slots target the same file clear the lower priority slot and log the conflict in LOCKS.md. No git. No source file changes.
Current time: Wednesday, March 4th, 2026 — 12:27 AM (America/Los_Angeles)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
